finding_results.notes: Halima and Nura reconstruct the theft, but Aklima Bewa's shed-strip kin line stays broken, leaving the substitute pages vulnerable to challenge and making the trip to Aminul urgent.

Compressed the four-line echo into a two-line exchange so Nura's relief lands once and Halima immediately redirects attention to the vulnerable middle of the ledger before the scene confirms the missing copied pages.
finding_results.summary: Removed transcript-like repetition after the ledger reveal and restored a clear leverage shift between relief and suspicion.
